sections.paragraph:
Original: עזוּבה

Transliteration: ‛ăzûbâh

Phonetic: az-oo-baw'

BDB Definition:

Azubah = "forsaken"
  1. wife of Caleb, the son of Hezron
  2. daughter of Shilhi, wife of king Asa, and mother of king Jehoshaphat of Judah

Origin: the same as H5805

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
